title: Dynamic Trees - Regions Unexplored
description: Compatibility mod between Dynamic Trees and Regions Unexplored
body:
![Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1037/792/regions_unexplored.png)

[![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/0Prkr13.png)](https://discord.gg/A4FCBS3) [![Forge](https://i.imgur.com/oeSBh9T.png)](https://files.minecraftforge.net)

## Overview
This mod makes Regions Unexplored compatible with Dynamic Trees, adding dynamically growing versions of trees added by said mod, and fully replacing them during world generation.
The trees, their behaviour and their generation can be customized and tweaked through the use of Tree Packs.

## Features
### Currently Included Trees
- Ashen Tree
- Giant Bamboo
- Baobab
- Blackwood
- Magnolia
- Pink Magnolia
- White Magnolia
- Blue Magnolia
- Cypress
- Dead Tree
- Silver Birch
- Enchanted Birch
- Eucalyptus
- Larch
- Golden Larch
- Joshua
- Kapok
- Maple
- Red Maple
- Orange Maple
- Mauve Tree
- Palm Tree
- Pine
- Redwood
- Socotra
- Willow
- Brimwood
- Cobalt Tree
### Included Mushrooms (Requires Dynamic Trees Plus):
- Pink Bioshroom
- Blue Bioshroom
- Yellow Bioshroom
- Green Bioshroom

### World Gen
Dynamic Trees generate all over the overworld RU biomes!

## Other addons
Addons for other mods can be found in the [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) page.
### Suggestions and Requests
To request a new mod for compatibility please do it [Github Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/DynamicTreesTeam/discussions/categories/compatibility-addon-suggestions).

## Requirements
- [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees)
- [Dynamic Trees Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictreesplus) (Optional)
- [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored)

## License, Permission and Modpacks
Permission is hereby granted to use this mod in ANY mod pack or server. Please don't ask for permission to You can use this in any mod pack you'd like! No need to ask.
This mod has an MIT license and its source is public on github.
